lines: The Fever fell 113‑96 to the Atlanta Dream yesterday and will host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 today, keeping their 31‑44 record on the road.
The World Cup is in full swing in the U.S. right now, so there’s a big international game on the radar.
escape_hatch: sounds like the Fever are the ones to watch—have you been keeping up with them?

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 21. The Fever fell 113‑96 to the Atlanta Dream yesterday and will host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 today, keeping their 31‑44 record on the road. The World Cup is in full swing in the U.S. right now, so there’s a big international game on the radar. And if it gets away from you, your out is: sounds like the Fever are the ones to watch—have you been keeping up with them?
